name: Santa Rosa Golf & Country Club - CA
address: 333 Country Club Dr, Santa Rosa, CA 95401
about: Santa Rosa Golf & Country Club is a private, family-oriented country club in Sonoma County, California. The venue is centered around an 18-hole championship golf course described as immaculately groomed, challenging, and set in a beautiful park-like environment. While primarily a traditional country club for members, its amenities and services are designed to offer a complete golf and social experience to its members. The club offers a range of activities and facilities beyond golf, including dining, fitness, pickleball, and aquatics, making it a comprehensive recreational and social hub.
why_golfers_like_it: Beautiful and challenging championship golf course in a scenic Sonoma County setting
Comprehensive golf programs for all skill levels, including professional instruction and a unique 100-yard practice hole
Access to a wide range of Invited Network clubs and over 1,000 hotel/resort partners through the XLife Benefits program

food_and_drink.notes: Expertly orchestrated dining by an Executive Chef, offering options from family dinners to special occasions with personalized service.
Includes a dedicated bar area (Appellation Bar) as part of the dining facilities.

faq.question: Do I need clubs to play?
faq.answer: The club provides programs for all levels, and its professional staff offers club fitting services, but members typically use their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not typically permitted as the club features an on-site dining service and bars managed by an Executive Chef.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for completing an 18-hole round, but it describes the course as challenging and walkable.

faq.question: Is the club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Santa Rosa Golf & Country Club is family-friendly and offers a range of activities and programs for families, including youth golf lessons like 'Crush It! Youth Golf Lessons'.
